title: Major Cyber Attacks in March 2026: OAuth Phishing, SVG Smuggling, Magecart, and

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Major Cyber Attacks in March 2026: OAuth Phishing, SVG Smugg

detection:

            - '*radicado.hta*'

level: high

        $h1 = "57ce6187be65c1c692a309c08457290ae74a0047304de6805dbb4feb89c0d7e5" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "6a581c3b6fe7847bb327f5d76e05653a1504e51023454c41835e5dc48bc13ba4" ascii nocase
